title: acacia lawsonii
intro: Acacia lawsonii, also known as the Kenya thorn, is a species of thorny shrub or small tree native to Kenya. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Acacia lawsonii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as providing protection against certain diseases. The herbal preparations of Acacia lawsonii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
